iotevents.alarmmodel.sqs.CfnAbout: Sends information about the detector model instance and the event that triggered the action to an Amazon SQS queue.

iotevents.alarmmodel.sqs.Payload.Description: You can configure the action payload when you send a message to an Amazon SQS queue.

iotevents.alarmmodel.sqs.QueueUrl.Description: The URL of the SQS queue where the data is written.

iotevents.alarmmodel.sqs.UseBase64.Description: Set this to TRUE if you want the data to be base-64 encoded before it is written to the queue. Otherwise, set this to FALSE.
